name: Turkey Soup Continental
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Add onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add turkey, potatoes, celery, and broth to the pot.
4. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low and cook until vegetables are tender-crisp, approximately 20-25 minutes.
5. Stir in corn, cream, salt, paprika, ginger, pepper, and chopped parsley.
6. Heat through thoroughly for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Garnish with extra chopped parsley before serving with crusty rolls.
